description: DMV Customer Queue Management — manages appointment scheduling, walk-in queues, estimated wait times, and service window routing

hard_stops.label: Location Closed
hard_stops.logic: Selected DMV location is closed (holiday, emergency, or outside business hours) — cannot queue customer

hard_stops.label: Service Type Not Available at Location
hard_stops.logic: Requested service type is not offered at this location — redirect customer to appropriate office

soft_flags.label: Long Wait Time
soft_flags.logic: Estimated wait time exceeds 60 minutes — offer online alternative if available for this service type
